notes: lux is a Go CLI video downloader whose engineering value is a compile-time init()+blank-import plugin registry that makes adding new site extractors trivially easy (46 extractors, domain-routed dispatch) paired with a Node-driven meta-CI pattern that generates 45 per-extractor workflows from a single template. Five entries cover two home-applicable knowledge/pattern items (plugin registry, CI template generation) and three security/governance anti-patterns (bearer tokens checked into git, globally disabled TLS verification, 23-line CONTRIBUTING with zero architecture docs).

entries.candidate: init()-based plugin registry with domain routing
